creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Justin Coffman from comment #7)

I thought the list of removed files was informational only :-)

You can always remove the files and then run svn diff so when applied (with patch -E < patchfile) the files are automatically removed. That way all the changes are included in the .patch file. The v3 patch file should do that.

Also notice that I removed PORTREVISION since we are bumping PORTVERSION.
